sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review. Note: passé composé vs imparfait is A2-level grammar that the A1 book introduces in Dossier 9; the A2 book will deepen it.
Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 9 (le logement, les pièces, passé composé vs imparfait). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
